goal.requested: Plan how to fix the full Playwright E2E failures, fix them, and pass the full E2E test.

changes.summary: Study archive desktop grid now uses min-[1200px]:grid-cols-3 to avoid exact xl breakpoint edge collapse.
Existing-work HLS uploads now start local thumbnail generation immediately and persist the generated thumbnail after video upload success.
Recorded the plan, instruction mapping, progress, and verification results.

intentionallyNotChanged: Backend API, persistence, and transcoding code
